testcase.name: test_tenant_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration53_features.py:29: in test_tenant_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Invalid email or password"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
